UDKGame.ini.info: Primary Renegade X game settings. The beginner-friendly parameter boxes write the same common values at startup, and this file remains editable for advanced tuning.

UDKEngine.ini.info: Network, Steam/query, and custom-content download settings.

UDKRenegadeX.ini.info: Renegade X-specific gameplay, voting, bot, RCON, and server-list settings.

UDKWeb.ini.info: Optional Renegade X web server settings. Leave disabled unless you are intentionally exposing it.

map.name: Starting Map
map.info: Initial map to load. Examples: CNC-Field, DEF-DarkNight, TDM-Deck.

game_class.name: Game Class Override
game_class.info: Optional. Leave blank for normal prefix-based Renegade X map loading. Example override: RenX_Coop.Rx_Game_Survival.

map_cycle_class.name: Map Cycle Class
map_cycle_class.info: Class name used in UDKGame.ini map rotation. Default for normal CnC maps is Rx_Game.

map_rotation.name: Map Rotation
map_rotation.info: Comma-separated map names without .udk. Leave blank to keep the existing/default rotation.

admin_password.name: Admin/RCON Password
admin_password.info: Optional admin password written to UDKGame.ini.

server_password.name: Server Password
server_password.info: Optional password required for players to join.

motd.name: Message Of The Day
motd.info: Optional. The Wiki notes MOTD may be bugged in Renegade X.

listed.name: List Server
listed.info: true shows the server in the launcher/server browser when networking is otherwise correct.

fixed_map_rotation.name: Fixed Map Rotation
fixed_map_rotation.info: true enforces the map list instead of normal voting behavior.

bots_disabled.name: Disable Bots
bots_disabled.info: false allows bots. true disables bots.

gdi_bots.name: GDI Bot Count
gdi_bots.info: Optional launch-time GDI bot count. Leave blank for game default.

nod_bots.name: NOD Bot Count
nod_bots.info: Optional launch-time NOD bot count. Leave blank for game default.

gdi_bot_difficulty.name: GDI Bot Difficulty
gdi_bot_difficulty.info: Bot skill multiplier for GDI. Typical values are 0.5, 1.0, 1.5, or 2.0.

nod_bot_difficulty.name: NOD Bot Difficulty
nod_bot_difficulty.info: Bot skill multiplier for Nod. Typical values are 0.5, 1.0, 1.5, or 2.0.

gdi_attack_percent.name: GDI Attack Percent
gdi_attack_percent.info: Approximate percent of GDI bots focused on attacking behavior.

nod_attack_percent.name: NOD Attack Percent
nod_attack_percent.info: Approximate percent of Nod bots focused on attacking behavior.

allow_downloads.name: Allow Downloads
allow_downloads.info: true allows channel fallback downloads for custom server content.

redirect_url.name: HTTP Redirect URL
redirect_url.info: Fast custom content download URL. Must have trailing slash and normally must be served from port 80.

redirect_use_compression.name: Redirect Uses Compression
redirect_use_compression.info: Set true only if your HTTP redirect files are compressed in the format Renegade X expects.

content_urls.name: Custom Content URLs
content_urls.info: Optional direct public URLs to .zip, .udk, .u, .upk, .ini, or .int files. Use one URL per line or separate with semicolons.

refresh_content_downloads.name: Refresh Content Downloads
refresh_content_downloads.info: false uses cached downloaded content. true redownloads and re-extracts custom content on startup.

web_enabled.name: Enable Web Server
web_enabled.info: Optional Renegade X web server. Leave off unless you intend to expose and test it.

web_max_connections.name: Web Max Connections
web_max_connections.info: Maximum simultaneous connections for the optional Renegade X web server.

enable_rcon.name: Enable RCON
enable_rcon.info: Writes bEnableRcon in UDKRenegadeX.ini. RCON panel support in GSA is still unverified.

max_spectators.name: Max Spectators
max_spectators.info: Maximum spectator slots. Set 0 to effectively disable spectator slots.

admin_can_pause.name: Admins Can Pause
admin_can_pause.info: Allows admins to pause the game if the game mode honors it.

players_must_be_ready.name: Players Must Be Ready
players_must_be_ready.info: Requires player ready state before match start when supported.

wait_for_net_players.name: Wait For Net Players
wait_for_net_players.info: Wait for minimum network players before starting when supported.

net_wait.name: Net Wait Seconds
net_wait.info: How long the server waits for players during startup or match transition.

min_net_players.name: Minimum Net Players
min_net_players.info: Minimum players required for wait-for-net-player behavior.

restart_wait.name: Restart Wait Seconds
restart_wait.info: Delay before restarting/transitioning a match inside the game flow.

client_processing_timeout.name: Client Processing Timeout
client_processing_timeout.info: Timeout for client processing during travel/loading.

initial_credits.name: Initial Credits
initial_credits.info: Starting credits for players where the game mode supports it.

cnc_time_limit.name: CnC Time Limit
cnc_time_limit.info: CnC match time limit in minutes.

team_mode.name: Team Mode
team_mode.info: Team behavior string used by Renegade X. Common default is All.

max_map_vote_size.name: Map Vote Size
max_map_vote_size.info: Number of map choices shown in map voting.

recent_maps_to_exclude.name: Recent Maps Excluded
recent_maps_to_exclude.info: How many recently played maps are excluded from voting.

download_timeout.name: Download Timeout
download_timeout.info: HTTP custom-content download timeout in seconds.

use_vac.name: Use VAC
use_vac.info: VAC toggle where supported by the Renegade X build.

require_steam.name: Require Steam
require_steam.info: Require Steam authentication in Renegade X access control.

steam_auth_admins.name: Steam Auth Admins
steam_auth_admins.info: Use Steam authentication for admins where supported.

broadcast_admin_identity.name: Broadcast Admin Identity
broadcast_admin_identity.info: Broadcast admin identity for admin actions where supported.

moderator_password.name: Moderator Password
moderator_password.info: Optional moderator password written to Renegade X access control.

multihome.name: Multihome IP
multihome.info: Optional local interface IP passed as -MULTIHOME. Leave blank to bind normally.

extra_args.name: Extra Launch Args
extra_args.info: Optional extra UDK command-line arguments. Leave blank for normal servers.
